title: Bedwars Upgrades Display
description: Displays team upgrades purchased in bedwars on the HUD.
body:
When you or your team purchases a team upgrade or trap in a game of Bedwars, this mod will add it to a list on your screen so you always know what upgrades/traps you have, without having to look in the team upgrades menu.

🎮Supported Version: Forge 1.8.9

## Features:
- ✅ Supports all upgrades including tiered upgrades like forge upgrades
- ✅ Supports Traps
- ✅ Customizable HUD through an in-game menu

## Usage:
Download Forge for 1.8.9 and put this mod in your mods folder.

## Customization:
> Click "Upgrades Display" on the bottom right of the pause menu to access these features

- Toggle Mod - Lets you enable or disable the mod.
- Toggle Titles - Lets you enable or disable title prefixes for upgrade/trap names ("Upgrades", "Traps")

Note: This mod was specifically made for Hypixel Bedwars and may not work on other servers.
